race.comment: SNAP DECISION (6) has built nicely into this campaign and was unlucky not to get the verdict last time at Goulburn when flashing home to just miss the bob. Cherry-ripe now and keeps Heywood. Will take denying. CAYMAN ISLAND (10) has good early speed and gave backers another bold sight here last time, only to be grabbed late. Bouvillain's booking adds confidence - can go one better. SCORCHED LANE (5) went amiss last start at the Sapphire but remains in work, so should be right to go. Prior form stacks right up. LAUNCH MODE (2) finally shed his maiden tag last time out at start 24, and did so in quite the fashion. Is drawn to advantage and keeps the 3kg claim. Can go on with it now. RIVERBEND UNICORN (4) keeps teasing his supporters but has the peaks to be very competitive in this line-up. Have to keep safe.
